name: {☟︎ Voided-Siblings ❀✰}
description:
". . ."

"Blade in hand, you'd think that he would understand. Seems my bro is still offering one final chance."

"Human, turn away from this path now we'll show you how but, passing us is something that we cannot allow."

"Judging by that sickening grin on your face, seems this last chance is one your going to waste."

"Human, I'll never understand it, but this habit, can it, or trash it. We are completely sick of it!"

"YOU DARE TO TRY AND DESTROY EVERYTHING THAT I'VE BUILT?!"

"LIFELESSLY YOU STAND THERE DEVOID OF ANY GUILT!"

"Human, you'll come to regret all of this. You won't be missed. And yet, I'm determined that some kindness is still in there..."

"I've been waiting for this." "I'm sorry for this" "I'm NOT sorry for this."

_____________________________________________________
